hero.title: Approvals inbox
hero.body: Pending exchange approvals and guest intent approvals in one queue. Admins and operators can approve or deny; viewers are read-only.

viewerNote.title: Viewer access is read-only
viewerNote.body: You can inspect pending approvals here, but only workspace admins and operators can approve or deny them.

loading.title: Refreshing approvals
loading.body: Collecting pending exchange and guest approvals from the workspace.

emptyState.title: Inbox clear
emptyState.body: No currently pending exchange or guest approvals were found.
